# Prompts

This directory contains reusable task prompts for AI-assisted software work. Prompts should be generic, portable, and free of local filesystem paths or unrelated project names.

## Prompt Catalog

| Prompt | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `develop.prompt.md` | Implement features with planning, testing, and documentation. |
| `test.prompt.md` | Design or improve tests. |
| `document.prompt.md` | Create or improve documentation. |
| `review.prompt.md` | Review code, docs, or workflows. |
| `refactor.prompt.md` | Refactor while preserving behavior. |
| `architect.prompt.md` | Plan architecture and tradeoffs. |
| `add-endpoint.prompt.md` | Add or modify API endpoints. |
| `commit.prompt.md` | Prepare safe conventional commits. |
| `release.prompt.md` | Plan releases, changelogs, and versioning. |
| `forkme.prompt.md` | Adapt a repository or template for another project. |
| `kaizen.prompt.md` | Improve a codebase incrementally. |
| `skills-code-review.prompt.md` | Review agent skill or prompt changes. |

## Rules

- Use placeholders for repository names, paths, teams, and URLs.
- Keep prompts task-focused and avoid duplicating instruction files.
- Do not hardcode personal names, local directories, secrets, or product-specific assumptions.
- Update this catalog when adding or removing prompts.
